title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
posterAlt: Spider-Man: No Way Home (2021) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Peter Parker is unmasked and no longer able to separate his normal life from the high-stakes of being a super-hero. When he asks for help from Doctor Strange the stakes become even more dangerous, forcing him to discover what it truly means to be Spider-Man.
synopsis: Spider-Man: No Way Home is a 2021 action, adventure and science fiction film from United States. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.1 on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
